title: ICSSR Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Consultant Posts
description: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Consultant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Civil Engineering, any degree, and LLB can apply for the ICSSR Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned th...
